    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AutonomousV2
    Deprecated. 
    BackgroundTask
     
    BasicAuto
     
    Config
    The purpose of this class is to have all the relevant parameters in one place

    Documentation is inside the class file
    DecodeAuto
     
    DecodeTeleOp
     
    DecodeTeleOp.Alliance
     
    DefaultAutonomous
    Deprecated. 
    DefaultOpMode
    Deprecated. 
    Drivetrain
    Wraps the motors controlling movement into an easy-to-use drivetrain object.
    Elevator
    Deprecated.
    No longer relevant
    Elevator.ElevatorPosition
     
    Elevator.TrayPosition
     
    HardwareInitializer
     
    Intake
    Deprecated.
    No longer relevant
    Intake.ArmPosition
     
    Intake.ClawPosition
     
    Intake.IntakeMode
     
    MotorWrapper
     
    Odometry
     
    ParallelMotion
     
    Path
    Path is a class that organizes Waypoint objects into a single easy to manage object that will give suggestions for drive variables and gives access to information such as where the bot currently is on its mission.
    Path.Ahead
    Speed modes for the robot that are referred to in the same way as the speed modes for the cyclops in Subnautica.
    Path.traceMode
    Modes for how the bot will follow the waypoints
    PointOfInterest
    An object used by Odometry to create virtual points on the play field that can be used to get important relative information from
    Waypoint
    Simple object to be used by Path that contains the basic data for a bots position.
    ZeMotors
    Deprecated.
